  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

PIE_C_PBD_SW4_27_07_2013

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 713
Recv ID: 733
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: A7
Func Name: PBD

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "A24",
    "soft": "A0B5",
    "version": "269E"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 53264,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN CONTROL UNIT"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42007,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Touch sensor RH break"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Touch sensor LH break"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Door position abnormality"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LH Spindle Pulse encode"
  },
  {

    "name": "RH Spindle Pulse encode"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Latch Motor abnormality"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN COMM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42024,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU Error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42009,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Latch OPEN switch failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42016,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Latch CLOSE switch failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 41985,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Vehicle State Absent"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42019,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "RH-LH Spindle motor continuous energed detection"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 41993,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HALF latch switch failure"
  }
]
